title: A More Perfect Union: Guide to the Monuments and Memorials on the National Mall for the 2008 Civics Test | USCIS
content:
## A More Perfect Union: Guide to the Monuments and Memorials on the National Mall for the 2008 Civics Test
A More Perfect Union: Guide to the Monuments and Memorials on the National Mall for the 2008 Civics Test is a series of resources that allows applicants to study for the naturalization civics test while learning about the individuals and events represented by the monuments and memorials on the National Mall in Washington D.C. Each guide includes a narrative related to the subject and history of each monument or memorial, and information that is specific to the content on the 2008 Civics Test . There are 13 monuments and memorials included in the series.
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the Washington Monument
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the Lincoln Memorial
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the WWII Memorial
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the Korean War Veterans Memorial
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the Vietnam Veterans Memorial
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to Constitution Gardens
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the Memorial to the Signers of Declaration of Independence
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the Jefferson Memorial
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the George Mason Memorial
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the Franklin Delano Roosevelt Memorial
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the Martin Luther King, Jr. Memorial
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to the WWI Memorial
- A More Perfect Union series: The Civics Test Guide to Dwight D. Eisenhower Memorial
